entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop Arachis hypogaea L. studied for iron deficiency diagnosis

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A nutritional deficiency in groundnut characterized by chlorotic leaves and buds

entities.name: DIAGNOSTIC TISSUE TEST
entities.description: A test used to identify the iron status of plant tissue

entities.name: TOTAL IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The total amount of iron in plant tissue, noted as an unreliable index of iron status

entities.name: IRON STATUS
entities.description: The physiological state of iron availability within the plant tissue

entities.name: FERROUS IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of iron in the ferrous state, used for better assessment of iron status

entities.name: O-PHENANTHROLINE EXTRACTION
entities.description: A chemical extraction method using o-phenanthroline to measure ferrous iron

entities.name: EXTRACTABLE IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of iron that can be extracted from fresh leaf materials

entities.name: LEAF AGE
entities.description: The developmental age of the leaf, which affects extractable iron content
